nasb.text: Also I swore to them in the wilderness that I would scatter them among the nations and disperse them among the lands,

esv.text: Moreover, I swore to them in the wilderness that I would scatter them among the nations and disperse them through the countries,

cnv.text: 我在曠野也曾經向他們舉手起誓，要把他們分散在列國，四散在萬邦；

ccb.text: 我在旷野起誓要把他们驱散到列国，分散到列邦，
